div.p: Random fault injection with configurable probabilities TDD Spec: Fault Injection Module (M5)

Randomization Ranges: go type ChaosConfig struct { Duration time.Duration Interval time.Duration // 500ms KillProbability float64 // 0.01 PartitionProb float64 // 0.005 LossProbability float64 // 0.10 LossMaxRate float64 // 0.10 RestartDelayMin time.Duration // 5s RestartDelayMax time.Duration // 15s HealDelayMin time.Duration // 1s HealDelayMax time.Duration // 10s }
go delay = random(5s, 15s) after(delay): harness.RestartNode(n) killed[n] = false metrics.Restarts++
python half = cluster_size / 2 perm = random_permutation(nodes) group1 = perm[0:half] group2 = perm[half:]
python if random() < 0.1: rate = random() * 0.10 harness.SetPacketLoss(rate)
Background Monitor: go every 5s: ct = NewConvergenceTest(50 keys) if !ct.Success: ConvergenceFailures++
